goal: dead-clicks / orch-btn-clicks: Many controls ignore clicks until a full page refresh; afterward the expected UI (e.g. TaskModal from `editingTaskId`) appears â€” implying either pointer-event swallowing (see bootstrap audit) or modal gates that stay closed while board `tasks` are still `undefined` (`TaskModal` uses `open={Boolean(editingTaskId && editingTask)}`). Every spawned role uses model composer-2-fast. Before editing product code, read `.orchestrate/orch-btn-clicks-7894/discovery/BUTTON-CLICK-AUDIT.md`. Respect `AGENTS.md` TaskModal rules (`tasks === undefined` means loading â€” never coerce board tasks to `[]`). Do not revert sibling agents' work â€” stay inside assigned pathsAllowed.
summary: Dead clicks until refresh â€” finishing overlay/DnD/card stacking fixes from the audit and closing the TaskModal gap where URL opens a task before the tasks query hydrates so clicks no longer feel silently ignored.
acceptanceCriteria: Root planner discovery is reflected in `discovery/BUTTON-CLICK-AUDIT.md` (bootstrap) with prioritized causes and file-level pointers.
Implementation workers land fixes with regression tests where feasible; Jest + tsc stay green on touched slices.
Each verifier independently confirms its target slice against the audit recommendations and records a strong verification class or a concrete blocker.

If users report refresh-fixed modals, TaskModal opens while `tasks` are still loading when `editingTaskId` is set (loading chrome inside modal), without regressing stale deep-link clearing once tasks resolve.

tasks.name: bootstrap-btn-clicks-ref
tasks.scopedGoal: Produce the single descendant-facing reference: `.orchestrate/orch-btn-clicks-7894/discovery/BUTTON-CLICK-AUDIT.md` cataloging every likely click-swallowing pattern in the repo (stacking/`::before`/`::after` card-as-link overlays, z-index, `pointer-events`, `@hello-pangea/dnd` interactive blocking per AGENTS.md, AntD Drawer/Modal mask quirks, invisible full-bleed wrappers) with repo-relative paths and line anchors where possible, plus a prioritized fix order for sibling workers. Include an explicit row for **refresh-then-modal** symptoms: contrast silent URL updates vs overlay-blocked clicks; cite `TaskModal` `open={Boolean(editingTaskId && editingTask)}` vs `tasks === undefined` loading semantics from AGENTS.md.
tasks.brief:
## Must read
- `AGENTS.md` (DnD + TaskModal gotchas).
- `src/pages/board.tsx` (`ColumnsViewport` already documents intentional `pointer-events: none` on fades â€” cite as good pattern).
- `src/components/projectCard/index.tsx` (card-as-link `TitleLink::after` covering the card; `MetaRow` uses `z-index: 1` â€” audit whether every interactive child is above the pseudo-layer or whether some controls are still dead).
- Grep `src/` for `Draggable`, `Drag`, `disableInteractiveElementBlocking`, `onClick`, `::after`, `::before`, `pointer-events`, `z-index`, `inset: 0`.

## Deliverable
Create/update **only** files under `.orchestrate/orch-btn-clicks-7894/discovery/**`. The markdown must include:
1. **Executive summary** (5 bullets max) of the most probable regressions.
2. **Inventory table**: Surface | Symptom | Suspected root | Files | Suggested fix pattern.
3. **DnD audit**: list every `Draggable`/`Drag` whose child tree includes native interactive elements (`button`, `input`, etc.) and whether `disableInteractiveElementBlocking` is already set.
4. **Stacking audit**: list pseudo-elements and positioned wrappers that span interactive areas without `pointer-events: none`.
5. **Handoff**: standard orchestrate handoff sections (`## Branch`, `## What I did`, `## Measurements` if any).

Do not change application `src/**` in this task â€” reference only.
acceptance: `BUTTON-CLICK-AUDIT.md` exists and is substantive (inventory + DnD + stacking sections).
No edits outside `.orchestrate/orch-btn-clicks-7894/discovery/**`.
Handoff names the audit path and highlights top 3 fixes for implementers.

tasks.name: fix-hit-target-stacking
tasks.scopedGoal: Eliminate dead clicks on buttons and menus where card-as-link or stretched pseudo-elements steal pointer events; normalize stacking (`z-index`, `position`, `pointer-events: none` on decorative layers only) on project surfaces called out in the bootstrap audit (minimum: `projectCard`, `projectList`, `projectPopover` if in scope).
tasks.brief:
Read `handoffs/bootstrap-btn-clicks-ref.md` (or the audit file path from that handoff) and `.orchestrate/orch-btn-clicks-7894/discovery/BUTTON-CLICK-AUDIT.md`.

## Implementation guidance
- Prefer **not** removing the card-as-link pattern: keep accessibility, but ensure every real control sits above the stretched hit target OR mark the decorative stretch with `pointer-events: none` where semantically correct.
- Any `::after` / `::before` used only for visuals should not intercept clicks intended for buttons.
- Add or extend RTL/Jest tests that click auxiliary controls (kebab, like, etc.) and assert handlers fire (use `userEvent` / `fireEvent` per existing suite style).

## Scope
Touch only files you need under your `pathsAllowed`. If the audit points to additional files in this slice, include them in a follow-up handoff note rather than breaching `pathsForbidden`.

## i18n
Only if new visible strings (unlikely); otherwise skip.
acceptance: Buttons/menus on project cards/lists respond to click in dev and in new/updated tests.
No regression to keyboard focus order or link navigation for the primary card target.
CI test slice for touched components passes.

tasks.name: fix-dnd-interactive-clicks
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix board Kanban interactions where `@hello-pangea/dnd` suppresses clicks on native interactive elements inside draggables; align with AGENTS.md (`disableInteractiveElementBlocking` where appropriate) for task cards, column handles, and related drag wrappers.
tasks.brief:
Read the bootstrap audit DnD section and `AGENTS.md` drag-and-drop notes.

## Tasks
1. Inventory `src/components/column/**`, `src/components/dragAndDrop/**`, and any task-card presentation under `src/components/column/` or shared drag helpers.
2. For each `Draggable`/`Drag` root that wraps or fronts a `button`, `input`, `textarea`, `select`, etc., either:
   - move the interactive element outside the blocked subtree, or
   - pass `disableInteractiveElementBlocking` on the library component (document why in a short code comment only if non-obvious).
3. Add regression tests (mount column/task card, `userEvent.click` on a control that was previously dead) following existing `@hello-pangea/dnd` test patterns in the repo.

## Out of scope
- Do not change reorder mutation semantics or `useDragEnd` logic.

tasks.name: fix-taskmodal-open-while-tasks-loading
tasks.scopedGoal: Fix perceived dead clicks on task-open flows where `editingTaskId` is set in the URL but `TaskModal` stays closed until after a full refresh because board `tasks` are still `undefined` (`open` currently requires both `editingTaskId` and `editingTask`). Show a loading modal (or equivalent AntD-safe placeholder) whenever `editingTaskId` is a real id and tasks are still loading; preserve existing stale-ID cleanup once tasks resolve to a concrete array without a matching task.
tasks.brief:
Read `BUTTON-CLICK-AUDIT.md` refresh/modal notes and `AGENTS.md` TaskModal guidance.

## Implementation
- Adjust `TaskModal` `open` logic so users see feedback while `tasks === undefined` and `editingTaskId` is set (non-placeholder).
- Guard form/footer destructive actions until `editingTask` exists.
- Do **not** coerce board page `tasks` to `[]` â€” fix stays inside TaskModal (and tests).

## Tests
- Extend `src/components/taskModal/index.test.tsx` (or strict sibling) to cover: URL has `editingTaskId`, tasks query unresolved â†’ modal visible with loading UI; tasks resolve with match â†’ full form; stale id after resolve â†’ URL cleared per existing behavior.
acceptance: Modal opens with loading treatment when `editingTaskId` is present during `tasks === undefined`.
No regression on stale deep-link clearing after tasks load.
Jest + eslint + tsc clean for touched paths.
